ip_outcome_note: Card frame names 'Bea' and the depicted figure matches Bea's canonical character design (Galar karate uniform: sleeveless dark top, fingerless gloves, orange-accented athletic bottoms, silver-grey crop). The Vivid Voltage 147 print art depicts the interior of Stow-on-Side Stadium as it appears in Pokemon Sword, where Bea is the version-exclusive Fighting-type Gym Leader.

trivia_bullets.text: Bea is one of five Galar Gym Leader Supporter cards printed in Vivid Voltage (SWSH4): Allister (no. 146), Bea (no. 147), Leon (no. 154), Nessa (no. 157), and Opal (no. 158). [Bulbapedia: Vivid Voltage / via WebSearch snippet]
Regular print art by take; Full Art and Rainbow Rare prints feature artwork by Hideki Ishikawa. [Bulbapedia: Bea (Vivid Voltage 147), via WebSearch snippet]

Bea is the version-exclusive Fighting-type Gym Leader of Stow-on-Side Stadium in Pokemon Sword; in Pokemon Shield, the slot is filled by Allister (Ghost-type) — the Stow-on-Side gym is the major version-asymmetric pair in Galar's league. [Bulbapedia: Bea / Stow-on-Side Stadium, via WebSearch snippet]

In Pokemon Sword/Shield game canon, Bea is an expert of Galar karate, known for a stoic demeanor and a four-Pokemon Fighting-type team headlined by a Gigantamax Machamp. [Bulbapedia: Bea, via WebSearch snippet]

Oracle text: 'Discard the top 5 cards of your deck, and attach any Energy cards you discarded in this way to your Benched Fighting Pokemon in any way you like.' — a milling-payoff Supporter that rewards Fighting-bench acceleration decks. [PokemonTCG.io / pokemon.com TCG database]
No flavor text printed (Supporter Trainer cards in SWSH-era Pokemon TCG carry mechanical text only, no flavor block). [pokemon.com TCG database]
